headline: BUZZ Investing: Geopolitical Shocks Trigger Broad Market Retreat
summary: US equity markets transitioned from a tactical rotation to a broader, more defensive retrenchment during the recent period between February 11 and March 12. Read more here.

headline: Trump Says Lockheed Martin, Raytheon Are Building Like 'Never Seen Before,' Defends $200 Billion Pentagon Request
summary: Trump defended the proposed increase in the defense budget, but refrained from discussing the possible deployment of U.S. troops.

raw.headline: Trump Says Lockheed Martin, Raytheon Are Building Like 'Never Seen Before,' Defends $200 Billion Pentagon Request

headline: Is RTX (RTX) Still Attractive After A 52% One Year Share Price Gain?
summary: If you are wondering whether RTX at around US$200.73 is priced for opportunity or already reflects a lot of optimism, you are asking the right question. The stock has seen a 1.1% decline over the last week and a 1.4% decline over the last month, yet it still shows a 7.2% year to date return and a 51.8% return over the last year, which naturally raises questions about how much of its story is already in the price. Recent coverage around RTX has focused on its position within the Aerospace &...

headline: Trump invokes emergency powers with $23 billion in Gulf arms sales as Iran war wages on: WSJ report
summary: The U.S. approved roughly $23 billion in weapons sales to three Gulf nations, moving to bolster their defenses as the Middle East war continued to escalate.
